title: Talk about a film or book
subtitle: Give a tiny summary and opinion.
duolingoBridge: This is a classic bridge to B1: summarize something and say what you thought.
overview: Knowledge point 1: separate summary from opinion.
Knowledge point 2: use parce que to support the opinion.

items.fr: Le film raconte l’histoire d’une famille qui change de ville.
items.en: The film tells the story of a family that moves to another city.
items.es: La película cuenta la historia de una familia que cambia de ciudad.

items.fr: Le personnage principal est calme mais courageux.
items.en: The main character is calm but brave.
items.es: El personaje principal es tranquilo pero valiente.

items.fr: Au début, il ne connaît personne.
items.en: At the beginning, he does not know anyone.
items.es: Al principio no conoce a nadie.

items.fr: À la fin, il trouve sa place.
items.en: At the end, he finds his place.

items.fr: J’ai aimé ce film parce qu’il est simple et touchant.
items.en: I liked this film because it is simple and moving.
items.es: Me gustó esta película porque es sencilla y conmovedora.
